payload.description:
As a procedures dashboard user, I want conversation headers, session naming, tool call surfaces, and evaluation tool-output cards to render consistently and quickly, so that optimizer runs are readable and actionable in real time.

Feature: Procedure conversation and evaluation rendering polish
Scenario: Header alignment and compactness
Given a procedure conversation view with sidebar and selected session
When the conversation UI renders
Then sidebar and main headers share the same height token and controls are vertically centered

Scenario: New session naming
Given a user creates a new procedure chat session
When the session record is created
Then the stored category/name uses Optimize terminology for new sessions

Scenario: Borderless tool surfaces
Given tool call/response rows are shown
When tool cards render
Then region boundaries use flat background shading and no border/outline classes

Scenario: Progressive evaluation rendering
Given a tool response contains an evaluation id
When evaluation output renders
Then an initial card appears immediately from lightweight evaluation/task data
And heavy score results hydrate in a later phase
And segmented stage progress plus accuracy bar with baseline/current-baseline markers are visible when metadata exists
payload.title: Procedure conversation UI polish and evaluation tool-output responsiveness
